message:
refactor(server): extract TarjanScc struct, const-promote fns, and apply clippy idioms across ATC and TUI

ATC engine: extract Tarjan SCC algorithm into a dedicated TarjanScc
struct to eliminate the deeply-nested recursive closure with 9 params;
promote PidState::reset, EProcessMonitor::e_value, CusumDetector::new,
CalibrationGuard methods, and AgentLoadModel::new to const fn; replace
unsafe as-casts with safe u64_to_f64/nonnegative_i64_to_f64 helpers;
use mul_add for FMA-eligible arithmetic; adopt let-else, map_or,
sort_by_key(Reverse), and pattern matching on Option equality in tests;
derive Eq on SessionSummary; generalize HashMap hasher params.

TUI screens: introduce AnalyticsStatusStripLine and BottomRailContext
structs to replace long positional parameter lists (clippy
too_many_arguments); promote NO_VERSION_FULL_SNAPSHOT_INTERVAL_MICROS to
module-level const and fix its doc comment (10s -> 30s); simplify
startup_checks path comparison by removing unnecessary Option wrapping;
use map_or in static_files; fix doc backtick escaping.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
